description: Template for the per-snapshot file inventory emitted alongside a source snapshot copy. One inventory file per manifest entry. Copy this template to docs/migration/inventories/<id>.json when running the copy, fill in the real source_commit, target_commit, and per-file sha256 values, and submit the inventory in the same PR as the snapshot. Never invent hashes; they must be computed from the actually copied files.
source_subpath: <subdirectory in the source repo, or null>
target_path: <path in the monorepo, for example packages/sdk>
target_commit: <full 40-char SHA of the initial monorepo commit that lands this snapshot>
copy_tool: <command or script used, for example tar+rsync wrapper, with version>

files.sha256: <sha256 of the copied file, lowercase hex, 64 chars>
files.matched_include: <the included_paths glob from the allowlist that allowed this file>

verification.npm_pack_dry_run: <path to npm pack --dry-run --json output captured in the same PR, or null if not a publishable package>
verification.boundary_scan: <path to public-boundary scan output captured in the same PR>
verification.secret_scan: <path to secret scan output captured in the same PR>

reviewer_signoff.comment: <short note confirming every copied file is matched by an included_paths entry and no excluded file leaked through>
